category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Argentina mandatory electrical-safety certification (S-mark), IRAM/IEC standards, and mandatory energy-efficiency labelling.

title.en: China-to-Argentina Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Argentina's mandatory electrical-safety S-mark certification (Resolucion 169/2018), IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, mandatory energy-efficiency labelling, R-600a refrigerant requirements, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与阿根廷强制电气安全S标志认证（第169/2018号决议）、IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、强制能效标识、R-600a制冷剂要求及境内进口商义务差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與阿根廷強制電氣安全S標誌認證（第169/2018號決議）、IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、強制能效標識、R-600a製冷劑要求及境內進口商義務差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, certification-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Argentine legislation (Secretaria de Comercio resolutions), IRAM/IEC standards, energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, ENACOM provisions, and importer registration requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认证机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿根廷法律（商务秘书处决议）、IRAM/IEC标准、能效标识门槛值、ENACOM条款及进口商注册要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認證機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿根廷法律（商務秘書處決議）、IRAM/IEC標準、能效標識門檻值、ENACOM條款及進口商註冊要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Argentina compliance gaps: (1) mandatory electrical-safety certification under Resolucion 169/2018 (Secretaria de Comercio) carrying the 'S' safety mark, issued via IRAM or another recognized certifier and tested to IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24 — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) mandatory energy-efficiency labelling (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica) issued via IRAM, requiring testing to IRAM 2404-3 / IEC 62552, which Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not satisfy; (3) appointment of an Argentine in-country importer holding a CUIT tax ID who is the legally responsible party — there is no self-certification route for foreign manufacturers; and (4) the certification model is 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, which broadly matches Chinese single-phase supply (China three-phase is 380 V). R-600a refrigerant is well-aligned with IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24 requirements but charge documentation must be verified. Argentina has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime — those EU obligations do not apply.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大阿根廷合规差距：（1）依据第169/2018号决议（商务秘书处）的强制电气安全认证，附"S"安全标志，由IRAM或其他认可认证机构颁发并按IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24检测——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）强制能效标识（能效标签），由IRAM颁发，须按IRAM 2404-3/IEC 62552检测，中国GB 12021.2等级不满足该要求；（3）须委任持有CUIT税号、作为法定责任方的阿根廷境内进口商——外国制造商无自我认证途径；（4）认证机型为220 V/50 Hz单相，与中国单相供电大致吻合（中国三相为380 V）。R-600a制冷剂与IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24要求高度一致，但充注量文件须核实。阿根廷没有欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度——上述欧盟义务不适用。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大阿根廷合規差距：（1）依據第169/2018號決議（商務秘書處）的強制電氣安全認證，附"S"安全標誌，由IRAM或其他認可認證機構頒發並按IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24檢測——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）強制能效標識（能效標籤），由IRAM頒發，須按IRAM 2404-3/IEC 62552檢測，中國GB 12021.2等級不滿足該要求；（3）須委任持有CUIT稅號、作為法定責任方的阿根廷境內進口商——外國製造商無自我認證途徑；（4）認證機型為220 V/50 Hz單相，與中國單相供電大致吻合（中國三相為380 V）。R-600a製冷劑與IRAM/IEC 60335-2-24要求高度一致，但充注量文件須核實。阿根廷沒有歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度——上述歐盟義務不適用。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (Secretaria de Comercio / Boletin Oficial), IRAM, IEC, or ENACOM primary sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
